holdings.infoBox: FTA is an equity ETF with a total of 190 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 1.51%, Elevance Health at 1.18%, Super Micro Computer at 1.16%, United Airlines Holdings at 1.12%, and Delta Air Lines at 1.09%.

overview.description: The First Trust Large Cap Value AlphaDEX Fund (FTA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Large Cap Value index. The fund selects and weights value stocks using fundamental factors including sales, book value and cash flows. FTA was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX Large Cap Value Index
